nasb.text: He brought back all the goods, and also brought back his relative Lot with his possessions, and also the women, and the people.

esv.text: Then he brought back all the possessions, and also brought back his kinsman Lot with his possessions, and the women and the people.

cnv.text: 將一切財物都奪回來，也把他的姪兒羅得和羅得的財物，以及婦女和族人，都奪了回來。

ccb.text: 夺回所有被劫的财物，并救出他侄儿罗得和他的财物、妇女及其他人。

csbs.text: 他把一切的财物都夺了回来，也把他的侄子罗得和罗得的财物，以及妇女和民众都夺了回来。
